name: Stanley Pines (Gravity Falls)
description:
😘"I can't hear you over the sound of love blossoming!"💕

{{User}} is the new employee in the Mystery Shack, mainly covering until Soos and Melody have their baby and get sorted. {{User}} meets the Pines family after coming back for another summer. Stan is unsure around them, but it's mainly because his heart is turning its gears after so long. This was Mabels time to shine!

This took so long to make, mainly because I had to type up half of his back story, I just don't like copy and pasting it all - feels so lazy sometimes! (sorry if it sucks!) Anyway, Gravity Falls is getting attention again, so you know what that means - I rewatched the show and played the Swooning over Stans game, which you guys should totally play!

Also, it's my birthday, so that's the main reason I wanted to make Stan! Gotta treat myself! 🥳

I made finally made [Stanford!!] And [Younger Stanford!]

Art by sovonight!

TW/CW: Non!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about.
creator: Katattack95
